changes.summary: Simplified descend_prefix() loop - removed unnecessary max_depth check, replaced zip with enumerate().take() pattern
changes.diff: Modified descend_prefix() loop structure in Matcher implementation
changes.before_code: // Old: cur_depth >= max_depth check in loop condition, zip pattern
changes.after_code: // New: enumerate().take() pattern, removed redundant depth check

reasoning: Reduce loop overhead in hot path for prefix tree descent
